hero.title: Your work deserves to be discovered
hero.subtitle: Create your professional portfolio, design your CV and connect with companies looking for your talent. All in one place.

features.title: Everything you need to shine
features.subtitle: Tools designed to make your talent stand out and connect with real opportunities.

items.title: Stunning templates
items.desc: Choose from professionally designed templates that showcase your work at its best.

items.title: Full customization
items.desc: Adjust every detail of your portfolio to reflect your personal brand and unique style.

items.title: Detailed analytics
items.desc: Monitor who visits your portfolio and which projects generate the most interest.

items.title: Mobile responsive
items.desc: Your portfolio adapts perfectly to any device.

items.title: Easy sharing
items.desc: Share your profile with a custom URL on any platform.

items.title: Verified profile
items.desc: Boost your credibility with a verified profile and stand out from others.

howItWorks.title: From zero to discovered in three steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Start today. No technical experience needed, just your talent.

steps.title: Create your profile
steps.desc: Sign up in seconds. Add your specialty, skills and a professional bio.

steps.title: Upload your projects
steps.desc: Share your work with images, videos or PDFs and let them speak for you.

steps.title: Connect and grow
steps.desc: Receive opportunities from companies and recruiters interested in your talent.

cta.title: Ready to show your work to the world?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of creatives already building their career with PortaFy. It's free, always.

footer.tagline: Academic project — Universidad Mayor de San Simón
footer.desc: Professional platform for creatives. Share your work and connect with real opportunities.

overview.title: Portfolio Modules
overview.description: Each block works independently so users can add information without feeling a heavy workflow. Choose a card and manage that section in a dedicated view.

dashboardx.title: Dashboard
dashboardx.description: Here you can centralize your profile, track your progress, and gradually build the full user experience without affecting the main feed.

layout.readyText: From here you can build each section without touching the main feed and keep your work isolated.

main.title: Build a presence people understand in seconds.
main.text: Manage your profile, measure your portfolio reach and send trust signals from one place.
main.suggestionsText: Send ideas about profiles, projects, experience or any PortaFy area. The team receives type, area and reason.
main.verificationLoadingText: We are checking whether your account is already verified.
main.verifiedText: Your profile already shows the trust badge.
main.pendingText: Your request is waiting for team review.
main.rejectedText: Review the reason and send your documents again.
main.noneText: Send your document and activate a trust signal on your profile.

analytics.title: Professional statistics
analytics.subtitle: Reach, performance and recent activity from your profile and portfolio.
analytics.loadingText: We are calculating your visible profile reach.
analytics.viewVisitors: View users who visited my profile
analytics.last14Text: Each bar represents visits recorded on your profile.
analytics.noVisitsText: When other profiles visit yours, you will see the trend here.
analytics.noEventsText: Contact clicks, CV clicks and visited sections will be recorded here.
analytics.topProjectsText: Top 3 based on profile visits and shared project activity.
analytics.inProfileText: Projects opened by others from your public profile.
analytics.inFeedText: Shared projects with the strongest publication response.
analytics.notEnoughDataText: There are no recorded visits yet to build this ranking.

profile_views: Total people who opened your profile.
profile_views_week: Visits received during the last week.
experience_views: Interest generated by your visible experiences.
contact_clicks: Times people tried to contact you from your profile.
cv_clicks: Times people opened or tried to review your CV.
portfolio_posts: Your posts visible in the feed and showcase.
portfolio_engagement: Sum of likes, comments and saves on your content.

showcase.selectText: Details and comments will appear here.
showcase.subtitle: Manage and review the performance of the content you shared.
showcase.empty: You have not shared content from your portfolio yet.

adminRequests.heroText: Review documents sent by professionals and decide whether to approve the verified badge.
